title: Glow Hearts
description: GlowHearts enhances visibility by giving wither-effect hearts a clean white outline, making it easier to see your health during wither damage, PvP, and intense fights. Currently in beta while hardcore hearts are being added. Permissions: You can heavily ed
body:
GlowHearts enhances visibility by giving wither-effect hearts a clean
white outline, making your health easier to read during wither damage,
PvP, and intense fights. Currently in beta while hardcore hearts are
being added.

## Permissions:
**✔ You can heavily edit or customize this pack for personal use**
